title: Living in Boulder Vlog 5 - 19 -2017: More Church Fathers

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief life update from Boulder, noting he is deep into reading Church Fathers as part of a project to read all books from the ancient Western world. He discusses how prolific the Church Fathers are and how long the project is taking, and shares excitement about a voice-to-text/text-to-speech app called Voice Reading that he wants to use with Wikipedia articles and potentially for transcribing his videos.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Vastly underestimated how prolific they are; they may have more text than everything else in the ancient world combined
Optimistic he can finish in another week once he powers through the Church Fathers
Very excited about it as a productivity tool for consuming long texts and Wikipedia articles
